title: Verify Experiment Targeting and Mutual Exclusivity
description: Test the cohort logic to ensure only eligible users see the Trial Corner, and that it doesn't conflict with other experiments.
preconditions: Two test users have just activated their ₹1 trial.

steps.description: 1. With User A, do not play any content within the first 5 minutes.
2. With User B, start playing content within the first 5 minutes.
3. Observe the homepage for both users.
4. Ensure User A is not shown any other onboarding experiments.

expected_result: User A sees the 'Trial Mode' widget and can access the Trial Corner. User B does not see the widget. User A is correctly excluded from other conflicting experiments.
